Intrinsic.description: Properties of the metadata itself, independent of context.
Intrinsic.tooltip: Is the metadata correct and trustworthy on its own?

Contextual.description: Whether metadata is sufficient and appropriate for its intended use.
Contextual.tooltip: Is the metadata complete and relevant for how it will be used?

Representational.description: How well the metadata is structured and expressed.
Representational.tooltip: Is the metadata easy to read and consistently formatted?

Accessibility.tooltip: Can the metadata be found, shared, and reused by others?

structural_completeness.name: Structural Completeness
structural_completeness.description: Measures the proportion of records that contain all required metadata fields, as defined by the detected schema profile.
structural_completeness.tooltip: Are all the expected fields filled in for each record?

property_coverage.name: Property Coverage
property_coverage.description: Measures how consistently metadata properties are used across all instances of each class in the dataset.
property_coverage.tooltip: Are the same properties used consistently across all items of the same type?

multilingual_labeling_coverage.name: Multilingual Labeling Coverage
multilingual_labeling_coverage.description: Measures the presence and distribution of language-tagged literals across the dataset, including how many resources contain multilingual metadata and how consistently languages are represented.
multilingual_labeling_coverage.tooltip: Does the metadata support multiple languages and use language tags consistently?
